code: import i18next from"i18next";import languageDetector from"i18next-browser-languagedetector";import{initReactI18next}from"react-i18next";import en from"./translations/en.json";import lt from"./translations/lt.json";i18next.use(languageDetector).use(initReactI18next).init({resources:{en:en,lt:lt},load:"languageOnly",ns:["common"],defaultNS:"common",fallbackLng:"en",whitelist:["lt","en"],debug:false,interpolation:{escapeValue:false}});
